rulings.Case Title: US BANK TRUST N.A. AS TRUSTEE FOR VOLT 2012-NPL1 VS. JEMAL GETU et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 6, 2012, line 6 - PLAINTIFF US BANK TRUST N.A. AS TRUSTEE FOR VOLT 2012-NPL1's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
